overview.description: The Amplify LQD Investment Grade 12% Target Income ETF (LQDM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is a passively managed ETF that tracks an index aiming to receive a targeted annualized income of 12% through investments in the LDQ ETF and selling one-week expiration, at-the-money call option contracts. LQDM was launched on Apr 20, 2026 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
infoTable: Bloomberg U.S. Investment Grade Corporate Bond 12% Income Covered Call Index
